recommendations.title: Pathaan
recommendations.overview: A soldier caught by enemies and presumed dead comes back to complete his mission, accompanied by old companions and foes.

recommendations.title: War
recommendations.overview: Khalid, entrusted with the task of eliminating former soldier turned rogue Kabir, engages in an epic battle with his mentor who taught him everything.

recommendations.title: Fighter
recommendations.overview: As India faces a militant attack in Kashmir, the country’s best combat aviators join forces under a reckless yet brilliant squadron leader to form 'Air Dragons', faces mortal dangers and their inner demons.

recommendations.title: Free Guy
recommendations.overview: A bank teller discovers he is actually a background player in an open-world video game, and decides to become the hero of his own story. Now, in a world where there are no limits, he is determined to be the guy who saves his world his way before it's

recommendations.title: To Have and Have Not
recommendations.overview: A Martinique charter boat skipper gets mixed up with the underground French resistance operatives during WWII.

recommendations.title: Sixty Minutes
recommendations.overview: Desperate to keep custody of his daughter, a mixed martial arts fighter abandons a big match and races across Berlin to attend her birthday party.

recommendations.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
recommendations.overview: With the help of an irreverent young sidekick, a bank robber gets his old gang back together to organise a daring new heist.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.

recommendations.title: The Woman in the Window
recommendations.overview: A seductive woman gets an innocent professor mixed up in murder.
